speaker: CCP
text: Thank you for calling American Express. My name is Sarah. May I have your name and the last five digits of your card number for verification?

speaker: CARDMEMBER
text: Hi Sarah, this is John Smith. My card number is 371449635398431. I'm calling because I noticed some charges on my account that I did not make.

speaker: SYSTEM
text: Authentication status: identity verified via account lookup. Device fingerprint matches known device.

speaker: CCP
text: Thank you, John. I can see your account. Could you tell me which charges you're concerned about? Please share the merchant name, approximate amount, and date if you remember.

speaker: CARDMEMBER
text: There are two charges. The first one is from AMZN Marketplace for $487.50 on March 1st. The second is from TechGadgets Online for $1,299.00 on March 2nd. I have never heard of TechGadgets Online and I did not order anything from Amazon that day.

speaker: CCP
text: I understand your concern, John. Let me look into those transactions. While I investigate, were you in possession of your card on those dates? And did you notice anything unusual with your account before these charges appeared?

speaker: CARDMEMBER
text: Yes, I had my card with me the whole time. I did not lose it or lend it to anyone. I also did not share my card details with anyone. The charges just showed up out of nowhere.

speaker: CCP
text: Thank you for that information, John. I am going to open a fraud investigation for both of these transactions. We will issue a temporary credit while we investigate. You should see the credit within three to five business days. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
